title: daphne cneorum f. major
intro: Daphne cneorum f. major is a variant of the pink-flowering daphne, a small, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of daphnetin, a bioactive compound. The health benefits of Daphne cneorum f. major include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using the plant medicinally.
